title: 菊花賞の後に・溢れる

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide takes first place! The champion of
this year's Kikuka Sho is Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes! My calculations were right!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide sure is amazing! She's a totally
different runner than she was before summer!
Even her physique looks a little different.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She must have trained a lot. There's no doubt
she's the strongest BNW member!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But that was an amazing race... I have no regrets!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hayahide! I'm gonna get even stronger until our next race! We have to race again!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket... Yes, absolutely!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We must run together once more—all three of us.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you can see... that I'm not okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haha... I'm pathetic.

I help her stand once she manages to stagger up,
and we make it back to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sorry for... you know, ruining everything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on. You and I both know I did.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
When I saw how Hayahide and Ticket were
getting stronger and stronger, I panicked and got
reckless and messed up all your plans.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And look at what happened.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No wonder everyone looks down on me. I'm just a
tiny weakling...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I KNOW!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay? I know the others at school believe in me
and there are people cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: They've always believed in me—in what I can do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I've always known that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I get it... That's not what I mean though... It's me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The one who doesn't believe in me, who calls me
short, spineless, and messed up—who thinks I'm
completely worthless...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's always been me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...This was all pointless.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who doesn't believe in myself. So
running to show other people that there's more to
me than what they see... It was all for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Look, I'm sorry. I'm just tired.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I need a break from training... and from racing.
